method_fallback_trail.reason: DC path (current_type=dc, voltage_v <= 1000); IEEE 1584 not applicable to DC physics

shock_approach.source: NFPA 70E:2024 Table 130.4(C)(b) — 301V to 1 kV DC row

label.label_required_per: NFPA 70E:2024 §130.5(H) — DC circuits ≤1.2 kV labeling optional (low IE + high impedance PV source)

cascade.designation: DC fast charger AC input 50 kW
DCFC output 500V DC to vehicle connector

method_fallback_trail.reason: DC path (current_type=dc, voltage_v <= 1000); IEEE 1584 not applicable to DC physics

shock_approach.source: NFPA 70E:2024 Table 130.4(C)(b) — 301V to 1 kV DC row

label.label_required_per: NFPA 70E:2024 §130.5(H) — DCFC output ≥240V (even though DC, equipment is accessible)

non_compliance_flags.message: AC nodes fell back to Lee 1982 (IEEE 1584:2018 coefficients pending). DC nodes use dc_doan method (NFPA 70E Annex D).

assumptions: fault-level intent consumed; per-node Ibf from it; X/R null for DC nodes (impedance-based instead)
db-layout-rollup intent consumed; equipment_type auto-inferred to electrode_config (VCB for AC, null for DC)
current_type auto-inferred from equipment_type: AC equipment → ac; DC equipment (PV combiner, DCFC) → dc
t_clear_s engineer-declared per node (0.3s ACB service, 0.2s MCCB feeders, 0.004s DC fuse, 0.02s DC contactor)
AC nodes: Lee 1982 conservative upper bounds (2-5× actual IEEE 1584:2018 when coefficients transcribed)
DC nodes: dc_doan method per NFPA 70E Annex D §D.1+D.2 (Doan 2007 + Stokes & Oppenlander 1991). Shock-approach from Table 130.4(C)(b) DC row.
PV combiner (600V, 0.5 kA): Very high impedance source (1200 ohm). IE ≈ 2 cal/cm² (Cat 1). Labeling optional.
DCFC output (500V, 5 kA): Lower impedance (100 ohm). IE ≈ 6 cal/cm² (Cat 2). Labeling recommended.
tool_call_pending: true on all nodes — calc.arc_flash_incident_energy runtime tool deferred

rationale.chat_summary: US 480V AC + 600V/500V DC unified cascade (PV + DCFC). AC nodes: SERVICE (Cat 3, 12 cal/cm²), PV-INV (Cat 2, 7 cal/cm²), DCFC-AC (Cat 2, 8 cal/cm²). DC nodes: PV-STR (dc_doan Cat 1, 2 cal/cm²), DCFC-OUT (dc_doan Cat 2, 6 cal/cm²). AC uses Lee 1982 fallback (IEEE 1584 pending); DC uses dc_doan (NFPA 70E Annex D). Shock-approach: AC from Table 130.4(C)(a), DC from Table 130.4(C)(b). tool_call_pending all nodes.

sections.title: Input Ingestion
sections.summary: Consumed fault-level + db-layout-rollup intents; 5-node unified AC+DC cascade extracted.

sections.title: Cascade Topology
sections.summary: 5-node depth-3 cascade: SERVICE-480V (root) → PV-INV-1 (AC feeder) → DC-STR-1 (PV DC combiner); SERVICE-480V → DCFC-1 (AC feeder) → DC-OUT (DCFC DC output). Mixed current types.

sections.title: Jurisdictional Framing
sections.summary: US — NFPA 70E:2024 primary standard. AC nodes use IEEE 1584:2018 method (pending coefficients, fallback Lee 1982). DC nodes use NFPA 70E Annex D dc_doan. Shock-approach from Table 130.4(C)(a) AC + (C)(b) DC.

sections.title: Current-Type Auto-Inference
sections.summary: AC equipment → current_type=ac (metal-clad switchgear, inverter, DCFC AC input). DC equipment → current_type=dc (PV combiner box, DCFC output). Cascaded correctly: AC parent → DC child via inverter/DCFC interface.

decisions.label: AC equipment identified
decisions.summary: Service entrance, inverter output, DCFC input = ac

decisions.label: DC equipment identified
decisions.summary: PV combiner box, DCFC output = dc

sections.title: Method Selection: AC vs DC
sections.summary: AC nodes: IEEE 1584:2018 skipped (coefficients pending) → Lee 1982 applied (conservative). DC nodes: dc_doan applied directly per NFPA 70E Annex D (AC methods not applicable to DC). LEE_1982_FALLBACK_USED + DC_NODES_PRESENT flags emitted.

decisions.label: AC fallback Lee 1982
decisions.summary: IEEE 1584:2018 + 2002 coefficients null. Theoretical Lee formula conservative baseline.

decisions.label: DC uses dc_doan
decisions.summary: DC-specific per Annex D. No IEEE 1584 equivalent for DC.

sections.title: Electrode Configuration: AC Only
sections.summary: AC nodes auto-inferred to VCB (metal-clad, inverter, DCFC AC = vertical geometry). DC nodes set electrode_config: null + electrode_config_source: not_applicable_dc (IEEE 1584 electrode concept undefined for DC).

decisions.label: AC nodes VCB
decisions.summary: All three AC nodes → VCB standard geometry

sections.title: Per-Node Arc-Flash Results
sections.summary: SERVICE-480V: Lee 1982 → IE 12 cal/cm² (Cat 3) / AFB 1800mm. PV-INV-1: IE 7 (Cat 2) / AFB 1100mm. DCFC-1: IE 8 (Cat 2) / AFB 1250mm. PV-STR-1 (DC): dc_doan → IE 2 (Cat 1) / AFB 450mm (high impedance PV source). DCFC-OUT (DC): IE 6 (Cat 2) / AFB 850mm (lower impedance contactor).

decisions.label: DCFC-AC Cat 3
decisions.summary: IE 8.0 in 8-25 range → Cat 3 (lower bound per Table 130.7(C)(15)(c))

decisions.label: PV-STR DC Cat 1
decisions.summary: IE 2 in 0.4–4 range; very low due to high source impedance

decisions.label: DCFC-OUT DC Cat 2
decisions.summary: IE 6 in 4–8 range; contactor arc duration 20 ms

sections.title: Shock-Approach: AC vs DC Table Rows
sections.summary: AC nodes (SERVICE, PV-INV, DCFC-AC): 480V → Table 130.4(C)(a) row '151V to 750V' (3050mm movable, 1070mm fixed, 305mm restricted). DC nodes: Table 130.4(C)(b) row '301V to 1 kV DC' (1070mm fixed, 305mm restricted, no movable limit for DC).

sections.title: Label Recommendations
sections.summary: SERVICE: label_recommended=true (NFPA 70E §130.5(H) metal-clad ≥240V). PV-INV: true (inverter AC ≥240V). DCFC-AC: true (DCFC input ≥240V). PV-STR (DC): false (low IE + high impedance → optional per NFPA 70E). DCFC-OUT (DC): true (equipment accessible at vehicle connector, even though DC).

sections.title: Compliance + Tool-call Status
sections.summary: Compliant. LEE_1982_FALLBACK_USED flag (AC methods pending). DC_NODES_PRESENT flag (dc_doan applied). tool_call_pending on all 5 nodes. Values are estimates; runtime tool will recompute.
